phase_statuses.title: Decompose backend knowledge-management orchestration
phase_statuses.objective: Split scope resolution and dataset/directory mutation responsibilities out of the current backend manager while keeping `KnowledgeManagementManager` as the stable facade.

acceptance_criteria.text: `KnowledgeManagementManager` no longer directly owns all management-scope resolution, dataset guard checks, dataset mutation orchestration, and permission-group scope validation in one file.
existing knowledge admin route behavior and permission-scope semantics remain unchanged.
knowledge-management flows still fail fast on missing root nodes, out-of-scope nodes or datasets, and invalid dataset creation input.

phase_statuses.title: Decompose frontend knowledge-bases page and hook
phase_statuses.objective: Split the knowledge-bases page shell and page hook into smaller units for tree/navigation state, dataset actions, and page rendering without changing current behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: `useKnowledgeBasesPage.js` no longer directly owns all tree loading, breadcrumb navigation, dataset detail loading, drag-and-drop moves, and create-dialog orchestration in one file.
`KnowledgeBases.js` no longer mixes page shell, toolbar, table, detail form, and tree panel rendering in one file.
current page interactions, test ids, create/update/delete behavior, and dataset move behavior remain stable after extraction.

phase_statuses.title: Focused regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded knowledge-management refactor preserved both backend and frontend behavior.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused backend and frontend knowledge-management tests pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and bounded residual risk.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构：以下一 tranche 聚焦 knowledge management 模块，拆分后端 KnowledgeManagementManager 与前端 KnowledgeBases 页面和 hook，保持知识库目录/数据集管理行为稳定并补齐验证。
